name: Viren Tolar
title: Shadowstealer
abilityWindow: ACTION:
abilityText: Select 1 player and exhaust this card. That player may spend 1 influence to gain 1 command token.

name: High Marshall Serisi
title: Arm of the Harbinger
abilityWindow: When you gain 1 or more command tokens:
abilityText: gain 1 commodity for each command token gained.
unlockCondition: Have your command tokens in 4 different systems.

name: Ellar Liser
title: Impetus of Control
abilityName: Echo of Subjugation - Harbinger of Chains
abilityWindow: ACTION:
abilityText: Spend up to 1 of each player's command tokens on the game board. Return those tokens to their reinforcements and for each token removed this way gain 1 command token and 1 trade good. Then, purge this card.

name: Seris Kael
title: Warden of Accord
abilityWindow: When a player returns a promissory note to its owner, you may exhaust this card:
abilityText: Those players each gain 1 command token and perform a transaction.

name: Velorine Nevorith
title: Keeper of Keys
abilityWindow: At any time:
abilityText: Increase the influence and resource values of planets in systems that contain other player's command tokens by 1.
unlockCondition: Have units in a system that contains 2 or more other player's command tokens.

name: Aranth Vel
title: The Everbinding
abilityName: Pact Sunt Servanda - For the Greater Good
abilityWindow: ACTION:
abilityText: For each other player, place 1 command token in a system that contains 1 or more of your units and no other player's command token. Then, purge this card.

name: Orrin Malvek
title: Deacon of Taxes & Prayer
abilityWindow: ACTION:
abilityText: Exhaust this card. Draw 1 action card and look at the top agenda. Place it on top or bottom.

name: Cyrala Vey
title: Bishop of Law & Scripture
abilityWindow: After an agenda is resolved:
abilityText: If the outcome you voted for is not resolved, produce 1 ship in a system that contains your ships with cost less than the votes you cast.
unlockCondition: At the start of the agenda phase, exhaust all but 3 planets you control.

name: Speaker Gilbrand
title: Cardinal of Governance & Faith
abilityName: Adoration of the Masses - Thousandfold Council
abilityWindow: During the agenda phase:
abilityText: An additional agenda is voted on each agenda phase. When an agenda outcome you voted for is not resolved, gain 1 command token.

name: Kelron Dross
title: Ember-Sword
abilityWindow: When a player activates a system, you may exhaust this card:
abilityText: That player may destroy 1 non-fighter ship with a cost less than 4. That system gains PRODUCTION equal to that unit's cost +2.

name: Thessa Scale
title: Ash-Plate
abilityWindow: When you place a structure from your reinforcements on a planet you control:
abilityText: Draw 2 action cards.
unlockCondition: Have 4 or more non-fighter ships of the same type in the same system.

name: Orun Slag
title: The Eternal Forge-Hammer
abilityName: Sledge of the Master - Factory World Mass Production
abilityWindow: ACTION:
abilityText: Remove any number of your units from the board and place them in systems that contain a planet you control and no other player's ships. Then, purge this card.

name: Draven Callas
title: Rummager of Relics
abilityWindow: At the start of a player's turn, you may exhaust this card:
abilityText: Place 1 exploration card that matches a planet that player controls from its discard pile on top of its respective deck.

name: Serel Venn
title: Bounding Cartographer
abilityWindow: At the start of the stratey phase:
abilityText: Choose 1 non-home non-legendary planet. Explore that planet as if it were any trait.
unlockCondition: Have 2 cards from different exploration decks in your play area.

name: Zairos Cvi
title: Explorer Extraordinaire
abilityWindow: ACTION:
abilityText: Place up to 5 purged exploration cards that do not place tokens on the game board on top of their respective exploration decks. Then explore up to 5 planets you control. Then, purge this card.

name: Dravok Veyl
title: Warshaper
abilityWindow: ACTION:
abilityText: Select 1 player and exhaust this card. That player may return 1 non-faction technology they own to research 1 unit upgrade technology.

name: Seraxis Thule
title: Battle Genealogist
abilityWindow: At any time:
abilityText: Apply +1 to the combat and unit ability rolls of units you own the unit upgrade technology for.

name: Zorath Ultimus
title: Evolution Incarnate
abilityWindow: ACTION:
abilityText: Select 1 unit upgrade technology you own. For each prerequisite on it, research 1 technology. Then, purge this card.

name: Veyla the Keeper
title: Custodian of Tomes
abilityWindow: When a player gains a non-faction technology:
abilityText: You may exhaust this card and allow that player to return that technology to their deck and gain 1 non-unit upgrade technology with a number of prerequisites up to the number on that returned technology +1.

name: Orthis Lithon
title: Rune-Smith
abilityWindow: When you exhaust a technology:
abilityText: You may place 1 fighter in a system that contains 1 or more of your ships.

name: Xirath Centious
title: The Eternal Sage
abilityWindow: ACTION:
abilityText: Return up to 6 technologies you own to the deck. Gain purged relic fragments equal to the number returned then purge this card.

name: Myrix
title: The Wax-Sealed
abilityWindow: When a player activates a system, you may exhaust this card:
abilityText: That player selects 1 ship; it gains capacity and PRODUCTION values equal to the number of unit abilities it has during that tactical action. If it has those values, increase hem by that amount instead.

name: Zythrix
title: Leader of the Endless Swarm
abilityWindow: When you produce 1 or more hits with a unit ability:
abilityText: Produce an additional hit.
unlockCondition: Produce 3 or more hits with a unit ability.

name: Xyra
title: The Venom-Queen
abilityName: Call of the Queen - The Endless Swarm
abilityWindow: ACTION:
abilityText: Place this card near the board. Once per action, when you would roll dice for a unit ability, apply +4 to those dice. Purgre this card at the end of the round.

name: Avaris the Seer
title: Keeper of Silence
abilityWindow: At the start of a player's turn, you may exhaust this card:
abilityText: Place 1 frontier token in a system with no planets, then look at the top card of the frontier deck. Place it on top of its deck or discard it.

name: Deyra the Voidborn
title: Warden of the Empty
abilityWindow: When you purge 1 or more components:
abilityText: You may produce 1 unit with a cost of 4 or less in a system that contains 1 of your ships. Reduce its cost by 1.
unlockCondition: Have units in 3 systems adjacent to a system that contains no planets.

name: Frontiersman Nothi
title: The Mouth of the Abyss
abilityWindow: ACTION:
abilityText: Draw 2 unused red-backed tiles and 2 unused blue-backed tiles. Choose 1 of each and purge the others. Place those tiles on the edge of the game board adjacent to 2 systems and a place a frontier token in each system that contains no planets. Then, purge this card.

name: Xythis the Whispering Mask
title: Gravetender Eternal
abilityWindow: Once per action, when a player exhausts a technology; You may exhaust this card:
abilityText: Ready that technology.

name: Ashara of the Silent Choir
title: Duke of the Necromancer
abilityWindow: At any time:
abilityText: This commander has the ability text of the commander with the lich token on it.

name: The Nameless Host
title: Revenant of Many
abilityWindow: When you unlock this card:
abilityText: draw 3 random unused heroes. Choose 1 to attach to this card and purge the rest. This hero has the ability text of each hero attached to it.

name: Koral Vel
title: Revenant of Verydith
abilityWindow: At the start of a player's turn:
abilityText: You may exhaust this card, that player may produce 1 unit in a system that contains 1 or more of their ships.

name: DOMI.N.O
title: Revenant of Myrr
abilityWindow: Once per action, when you produce 1 or more fighters or infantry:
abilityText: Place 1 additional fighter or infantry in that system.
unlockCondition: Produce 2 or more units of each of 2 different unit types at the same time.

name: Lost Throne of Pride
title: Fallen King
abilityName: Lost Throne of Pride - Revenant of Ruin
abilityWindow: At any time:
abilityText: You may treat a system that contains 1 or more of your units as if it had PRODUCTION 4 until the end of this action and immediately use that PRODUCTION.

name: Runebearer Lothos
title: Revenant of the Arcanum
abilityWindow: When a player explores a planet they control:
abilityText: You may exhaust this card to allow that player to explore that planet as if it were any trait. If you choose another player, draw an aciton card.

name: Arlir Mirrored
title: Revenant of Oblivion
abilityWindow: When you explore a planet that contians one of your structures:
abilityText: You may draw an additional card. Choose 1 to resolve and discard the rest.
unlockCondition: Control a planet of each planet trait.

name: Zairos the First
title: Revenant of Kairn
abilityName: Call of the Frontier - Home of the Fallen
abilityWindow: ACTION:
abilityText: For each exploration deck, you may shuffle 1 card from its discard pile into its deck. Then, explore a planet of each trait you control. Then, purge this card.

name: Zexan Myrix
title: Revenant of Xytheris
abilityWindow: After a system is activated you may exhaust this card and choose 1 player:
abilityText: Apply +1 to the combat rolls of that player's untis during that tactical action.

name: Melloh Terras
title: Revenant of Ponthous
abilityWindow: Once per combat round, when 1 or more of your units use SUSTAIN DAMAGE:
abilityText: You may produce 1 hit against your opponent's units in that combat.
unlockCondition: Have 3 units with SUSTAIN DAMAGE on the game board.

name: Pryxos Xiv
title: Revenant of Kryxos
abilityWindow: At the start of a round of space combat:
abilityText: Research 1 technology matching a unit you control in the active system and 1 technology matching a unit your opponent controls in the active system. Then, purge this card.

name: Malrik the Defiler
title: Keeper of Ashes
abilityWindow: When a unit is destroyed, you may exhaust this card:
abilityText: That player may place that unit in a system that contains 1 of their space docks and no other player's units.

name: Veythros the Shattered
title: Thrall of the Rift
abilityWindow: At any time:
abilityText: You may ignore the effects of each anomaly.
unlockCondition: Have unit in 3 systems containing or adjacent to anomalies.

name: Seraphine The Eternal
title: Bearer of Thrones
abilityWindow: ACTION:
abilityText: Place 2 unused throne planets into your home system, gain control of them and ready each planet in your home system. Then, purge this card.

name: Morwen Deyth
title: Keeper of the Ledger of Loss
abilityWindow: ACTION:
abilityText: Select 1 player and exhaust this card. That player may destroy 1 non-fighter ship they control and gain 2 trade goods. Then, they may place 1 neutral unit of the same type in an adjacent system that contains no other player's ships.

name: Vorun Kael
title: Mourning Marshall
abilityWindow: Once per action when you lose a combat:
abilityText: Gain 1 command token.

name: Serapha Untar
title: Voice of the Tombs
abilityWindow: At the start of a combat in a non-home system:
abilityText: Destroy all of your ships in that system and your opponent destroys ships in the active system with a combined cost equal to the combined cost of units you destroyed. Then, purge this card.

name: General Caelyn
title: Front-Line Standard
abilityWindow: When a unit uses SUSTAIN DAMAGE during combat, you may exhaust this card:
abilityText: That player may place 2 fighters and 2 infantry in that system.

name: Marshal Faelorn
title: Voice of High Command
abilityWindow: When you roll 1 or more dice:
abilityText: You may apply +2 to up to 2 of those dice.
unlockCondition: Have a damaged unit on the game board.

name: Lyla Terras
title: Fallen Stars
abilityWindow: ACTION:
abilityText: Choose 1 non-home non-legendary planet you control. Destroy all units on that planet, purge its attachments and its planet card. Produce hits on your opponent's non-fighter ships in an adjacent system up to that planet's combined resource and influence value. Then, place the destroyed planet token on that planet and purge this card.
